permissions.name: delegations.viewAny
permissions.description: Every tenant member can see their own delegations (as delegator + as delegate). Admin sees all.

permissions.name: delegations.view
permissions.description: View a specific delegation — delegator, delegate, or admin.

permissions.name: delegations.create
permissions.description: Every tenant member can create outbound delegations of their own roles. Admin can create on behalf of another user via manage_any (rare — mostly break-glass).

permissions.name: delegations.revoke
permissions.description: The delegator can revoke their own outbound delegations. Admin can revoke any.

permissions.name: delegations.manage_any
permissions.description: Admin-level cross-delegation management. Enables create-on-behalf-of + revoke-any + extend-ends-at (rare).

permissions.name: platform.impersonate
permissions.description: PERMISSION to invoke impersonation. Also requires the ENTITLEMENT `impersonation` on the PlatformUser row (see entitlements.json). Default-seeded on support department roles + super_admin. Product / engineering / other departments do NOT get this by default; must be granted per-PlatformUser by super_admin.

permissions.name: platform.impersonation.view
permissions.description: View own + adjacent impersonation sessions. Regular support agents see their own; security + super_admin see all in scope.

permissions.name: platform.impersonation.viewAll
permissions.description: Cross-tenant listing of active + historical impersonation sessions.

permissions.name: platform.impersonation.audit
permissions.description: Read the compliance evidence report. DPO is included because they own the compliance evidence-review workflow.

permissions.name: platform.impersonation.terminate
permissions.description: Force-terminate a session. Restricted to security + super_admin — even the impersonator's own /end route doesn't need this permission (they end via a different code path). Force-terminate is the LOCKDOWN action, distinct from self-service end.

permissions.name: platform.impersonation.extend
permissions.description: Extend a session past its default TTL. Reserved for super_admin — even security cannot extend. Requires the target session to hold impersonation_extended_ttl entitlement (enterprise contract-negotiated).
